strengths: Demonstrated proper needle handling and suture material management throughout the procedure

drills.name: Mark-to-mark needle path drill
drills.description: Practice 10 passes through both target marks on the Penrose drain before attempting any knot tying to ensure proper task setup
drills.targets_weakness: Task completion appears fundamentally incomplete or incorrect based on evaluation uncertainty

drills.name: Slit-closure check drill
drills.description: Tighten sutures just enough to close the slit without tissue avulsion, then visually inspect closure quality before final knot completion
drills.targets_weakness: Possible confusion between ligating loop technique and standard suture closure

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the complete task sequence slowly with minimal wasted regrasping and deliberate instrument movements
drills.targets_weakness: Extended completion time of 215 seconds indicates inefficient workflow

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on confirming proper task execution before pursuing speed improvements. The fundamental uncertainty about task completion suggests reviewing the basic suture closure technique for Task 4.
